message:
feat(search): implement weight-aware frankensearch RRF fusion (B2 milestone)

Pass lexical_weight and semantic_weight through to
rrf_fuse_with_frankensearch(), which now recomputes fused scores using
per-lane rrf_component_score() instead of relying on frankensearch's
unweighted rrf_score. Re-sort results after weight application since
non-unit weights may reorder rankings.

Configure the bridge orchestrator to explicitly use FrankenSearchRrf
backend and add panic catch_unwind with fallback-to-legacy support when
bridge_panic recovery is enabled.

Update tests from B1-era "weights are ignored" assertions to B2-era
"weights influence ranking" assertions. Add unit-weight equivalence test
between frankensearch and local RRF paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
